summary: The diff implements a comprehensive rebuild of the site as Luna's Kitchen, covering all eight requirements (REQ-14 through REQ-22). All major sections are implemented: sticky header, hero, about, menu, why choose us, reviews, location, CTA footer, and static asset usage. The implementation is thorough and closely matches the spec. One minor note: the file summaries mention that AboutPage.tsx, ContactPage.tsx, and MenuPage.tsx still exist as modified files with Eatery Burns Lake content in their summaries, but App.tsx no longer routes to them, so they are dead code rather than active branding.

hallucinated_features.description: A caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking is mentioned in the Footer according to the frontend-file-summaries.txt file summary for Footer.tsx.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any caffeine.ai attribution or UTM tracking in the footer. This appears to be an unasked-for addition.

hallucinated_features.description: Residual Eatery Burns Lake page files (AboutPage.tsx, ContactPage.tsx, MenuPage.tsx) still exist in the project with Eatery Burns Lake content per their file summaries, even though they are no longer routed.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-14 requires removing all Eatery Burns Lake pages and routing. While they are no longer routed, the files were not removed and still contain Eatery Burns Lake content per the file summaries.
